results.title: Business : AICB Recognises Over 700 Banking Professionals, Strengthens Regional Banking Talent Pipeline
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR, May 23 (Bernama) -- The Asian Institute of Chartered Bankers (AICB) has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening the banking talent pipeline in Malaysia and across the region, with over 700 banking professionals recognised at its 9th Chartered Banker Conferment Ceremony.
